notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

home.title: Find Minerals
home.description: Browse and filter minerals across the verse. Data updated for Star Citizen 4.7.
home.infoZone: Note: Mineral statistics are being collected and represent only a sample and averages. They may not perfectly reflect in-game reality, as you can find any quality of mineral on celestial bodies. This data may become obsolete in the future or be questioned based on game updates.
home.noRocksHint: Try adjusting your filters or search query

rockCard.notEnoughData: Data collected is not sufficient to provide reliable statistics

qualityDistribution.title: Quality Distribution
qualityDistribution.description: Distribution of mineral qualities by star system.
qualityDistribution.legend: Each bar represents the percentage of rocks whose quality falls within that range for a given system.
qualityDistribution.noData: No data available for quality distribution

miningProfit.title: Mining Profit
miningProfit.description: Track real-time mineral prices across trading terminals in the verse. Compare buy and sell prices to maximize your mining profits.

workOrder.title: Work Order
workOrder.description: Manage and track your mining sessions effectively. Keep an overview of your refining, minerals, and sales. Share your gains with friends and calculate your profits in real-time to optimize your mining operations.

sellingSection.title: Selling / Profit
sellingSection.selectSellingLocation: Select a selling location (prices based on UEX)

loadout.title: Loadout Calculator
loadout.description: Plan and optimize your mining loadout with our loadout calculator. Compare mining modules, gadgets, and lasers to create the perfect setup for your mining operations.

tooltips.minPower: Minimum laser power (All active lasers combined)
tooltips.maxPower: Maximum laser power (All active lasers combined)
tooltips.optimalRange: Optimal range (Average for all active lasers)
tooltips.maxRange: Maximum range (Average for all active lasers)
tooltips.optimalChargeWindow: Optimal Charge Window Modifier (max 50% of the total window)
tooltips.extractionPower: Total extraction power (All active lasers combined)

shopLoadout.title: Shop this Loadout
shopLoadout.description: Discover where to buy the components of your loadout across the verse. Compare prices and availability at different locations to optimize your shopping.
shopLoadout.noData: No shop data available for this loadout

loadout.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to delete this saved loadout?

refinery.title: Refinery
refinery.infoZone: Note: All data from tables are sourced from UEX data, after a new version of Star Citizen is released, it may take some time to update those data.

methodTable.description: Discover the available refining methods to transform your raw minerals into more valuable materials. Compare different refining options to optimize your yields and maximize your profits.

yieldTable.noResultForFilter: No result for this filter. Try other criteria.
yieldTable.description: Discover the available refinery bonuses to improve your yields and maximize your profits. Compare different bonuses to optimize your refining process.

marketPrices.title: Market Prices
marketPrices.infoZone: Note: All data from tables are sourced from UEX data, after a new version of Star Citizen is released, it may take some time to update those data.

shipMinerals.title: Ship Minerals
shipMinerals.description: Discorver the maximum price per SCU for minerals extracted by ship. Compare raw and refined prices to maximize your mining profits.

fpsMinerals.title: FPS Minerals
fpsMinerals.description: Discover the maximum price per gem and per SCU for minerals extracted by hand (FPS). Compare prices to maximize your hand-mining profits.

miningLasers.title: Mining Lasers
miningLasers.infoZone: Note: All data from tables are sourced from UEX data, after a new version of Star Citizen is released, it may take some time to update those data.
miningLasers.noResultForFilter: No mining lasers match your filters. Try changing your criteria.

modulesGadgets.title: Modules and Gadgets
modulesGadgets.infoZone: Note: All data from tables are sourced from UEX data, after a new version of Star Citizen is released, it may take some time to update those data.
modulesGadgets.noResultForFilter: No modules or gadgets match your filters. Try changing your criteria.
